subcodes.first_line: The Remembrance of God, in the form of the Sun, hath appeared from behind the Sea of Grandeur, from the horizon of utterance. Verily, He is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله علی هیئه الشمس خلف بحر الکبریاء عن افق البیان قد کان مشهودا انه لهو
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as sun, @station of the Manifestation of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
